summary: Add statistics and campaigns_leads to resourceIDFieldOverrides with their real PKs (stats_id, campaign_lead_map_id).
reason: The generator profiler did not emit ID-field overrides for these dependent resources; their PKs match none of the generic id fallbacks, so every row was dropped at upsert and both tables synced empty.
validated_outcome: statistics and campaigns_leads tables populate during 'workflow archive'; novel-feature commands (health, drift) now have data to query.
upstream_issue: Same class as cli-printing-press#689 (Kalshi resourceIDFieldOverrides); no smartlead-specific issue filed yet.
